zh: 自我懷疑，對自己能力或價值的懷疑。
en: Self-doubt is why we never change, and we don't take action.
en_example: Self-doubt is why we never change, and we don't take action.
zh_example: Self-doubt is why we never change, and we don't take action.
ja: 自己疑念、自分の能力や価値に対する疑い。
ja_example: Self-doubt is why we never change, and we don't take action.

en: Boldness is a stronger indicator of success than intelligence.
en_example: Boldness is a stronger indicator of success than intelligence.
zh_example: Boldness is a stronger indicator of success than intelligence.
ja: 大胆さ、勇気を持って行動する性質。
ja_example: Boldness is a stronger indicator of success than intelligence.

zh: 示範帶，展示自己能力或作品的錄音或錄影帶。
en: I need to make a killer demo tape to get the job.
en_example: I need to make a killer demo tape to get the job.
zh_example: I need to make a killer demo tape to get the job.
ja: デモテープ、自分の能力や作品を示す録音または録画テープ。
ja_example: I need to make a killer demo tape to get the job.

en: Once I got my composure, I called him back.
en_example: Once I got my composure, I called him back.
zh_example: Once I got my composure, I called him back.
ja_example: Once I got my composure, I called him back.

zh: 韌性，面對困難時迅速恢復的能力。
en: The 10% target gives you the resilience and the skill.
en_example: The 10% target gives you the resilience and the skill.
zh_example: The 10% target gives you the resilience and the skill.
ja: 回復力、困難に直面してもすぐに立ち直る能力。
ja_example: The 10% target gives you the resilience and the skill.

zh: 愛抱怨的人或事物更容易得到關注或解決。
en: The squeaky wheel gets the grease.
en_example: The squeaky wheel gets the grease.
zh_example: The squeaky wheel gets the grease.
ja: よく鳴く車輪は油をさされる（よく文句を言う人が注目されやすいこと）。
ja_example: The squeaky wheel gets the grease.

zh: 資訊過載，接收過多資訊導致無法有效處理。
en: We are bombarded with information overload from every influencer expert.
en_example: We are bombarded with information overload from every influencer expert.
zh_example: We are bombarded with information overload from every influencer expert.
ja: 情報過多、過剰な情報を受け取り処理できなくなること。
ja_example: We are bombarded with information overload from every influencer expert.

zh: 練習，反覆做某事以提升技能。
en: You need to practice boldness to get better at it.
en_example: You need to practice boldness to get better at it.
zh_example: You need to practice boldness to get better at it.
ja: 練習、繰り返し行うことで技術を向上させること。
ja_example: You need to practice boldness to get better at it.

zh: 嘗試，努力做某事的行為。
en: Make 10 attempts at what you want most in life.
en_example: Make 10 attempts at what you want most in life.
zh_example: Make 10 attempts at what you want most in life.
ja: 試み、何かをしようとする行為。
ja_example: Make 10 attempts at what you want most in life.

zh: 預設狀態，習慣性或自動的行為模式。
en: Most of us live on default, taking what's available.
en_example: Most of us live on default, taking what's available.
zh_example: Most of us live on default, taking what's available.
ja: デフォルト、習慣的または自動的な行動パターン。
ja_example: Most of us live on default, taking what's available.

zh: 巨大的失敗，極為嚴重或重大的失敗。
en: I had a whole section about my colossal failures.
en_example: I had a whole section about my colossal failures.
zh_example: I had a whole section about my colossal failures.
ja: 巨大な失敗、非常に重大な失敗。
ja_example: I had a whole section about my colossal failures.

zh: 企業家，創辦並經營企業的人。
en: I became an entrepreneur who sold companies for millions of dollars.
en_example: I became an entrepreneur who sold companies for millions of dollars.
zh_example: I became an entrepreneur who sold companies for millions of dollars.
ja: 起業家、企業を創業し経営する人。
ja_example: I became an entrepreneur who sold companies for millions of dollars.

zh: 心態，思考和看待事物的方式。
en: There is a mindset that I developed, called a 10% target.
en_example: There is a mindset that I developed, called a 10% target.
zh_example: There is a mindset that I developed, called a 10% target.
ja: 考え方、物事の見方や思考の仕方。
ja_example: There is a mindset that I developed, called a 10% target.

en: Once I got my composure, I called him back.
en_example: Once I got my composure, I called him back.
zh_example: Once I got my composure, I called him back.
ja_example: Once I got my composure, I called him back.
